objective: Create a new Notes note, write a unique marker into the body, and verify the marker through the AX tree without screenshot OCR.
preconditions: 备忘录 is installed and can be addressed by ${app_id}.
Screen Recording and Accessibility permissions are already granted.

notes: This recipe foregrounds Notes and uses pointer disturbance to create a new note and focus the body.
Verification uses AX tree text matching instead of screenshot OCR.
This is the first cross-app reusable native-app sample, not a generic desktop contract.

steps.purpose: Create a fresh note using the native Notes toolbar button.
Focus the note body text area through AX.
Write the marker into the body of the note through the clipboard so the exact ASCII marker survives input-method quirks.
Verify the body text through the AX tree, not screenshot OCR.

expected_signals: Notes can be activated and a new note can be created.
The body text area can be focused through AX.
The marker text can be typed into the note body.
The same marker can be verified through the AX tree.
success_criteria: The marker is visible in the AX tree under the note body contract.
The recipe completes without screenshot OCR.
non_goals: This recipe does not prove cross-app browser or music-player reuse.
This recipe does not require screenshot-based text verification.

known_limits.narrow_baseline: This is the first native Notes sample and may need one layout-specific adjustment after live replay.
known_limits.shared_app_state: Do not run concurrently with another Notes recipe against the same live app instance.
